Tip.Value: 不需打开文件直接复制文件文本内容 自动识别 UTF-8、UTF-16 和系统 ANSI 等常见文本编码
Copy file text content to the clipboard without opening it. Common text encodings such as UTF-8, UTF-16, and system ANSI are detected automatically.
不需開啟檔案直接複製檔案文字內容 自動識別 UTF-8、UTF-16 和系統 ANSI 等常見文字編碼

Command.Arguments: -noexit write-host '"%1"';$args = 'md5', 'sha1', 'sha256', 'sha384', 'sha512', 'mactripledes', 'ripemd160'; foreach($arg in $args){get-filehash '"%1"' -algorithm $arg | select-object algorithm, hash | format-table -wrap}

REG_SZ.MUIVerb: 显示/隐藏 隐藏文件
顯示/隱藏 隱藏檔案

CreateFile.Content: Dim wsh On Error Resume Next Set wsh = CreateObject("WScript.Shell") path = "HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced\HideFileExt" value = 1 If wsh.RegRead(path) = value Then value = 0 wsh.RegWrite path, value, "REG_DWORD" wsh.SendKeys "{F5}" Set wsh = Nothing

REG_SZ.MUIVerb: 显示/隐藏 隐藏文件
顯示/隱藏 隱藏檔案

CreateFile.Content: Dim wsh On Error Resume Next Set wsh = CreateObject("WScript.Shell") path = "HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced\Hidden" value = 1 If wsh.RegRead(path) = value Then value = 2 wsh.RegWrite path, value, "REG_DWORD" wsh.SendKeys "{F5}" Set wsh = Nothing

REG_SZ.MUIVerb: 显示/隐藏 系统隐藏文件
Show or Hide Hidden System Files
顯示/隱藏 系統隱藏檔案

CreateFile.Content: Dim wsh On Error Resume Next Set wsh = CreateObject("WScript.Shell") path = "HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced\ShowSuperHidden" value = 1 If wsh.RegRead(path) = value Then value = 0 wsh.RegWrite path, value, "REG_DWORD" wsh.SendKeys "{F5}" Set wsh = Nothing

REG_SZ.MUIVerb: 開啟多個登錄編輯程式

Tip.Value: 截屏后可直接Ctrl+V粘贴图片 适用位置:Word、QQ、PS等 快捷键:Win+Shift+S
After taking a screenshot, you can directly press Ctrl+V to paste the picture. It is suitable for Word, PS and other programs. The shortcut key is Win+Shift+S

REG_SZ.MUIVerb: 擷取螢幕畫面到剪貼簿

Tip.Value: 擷取螢幕畫面後可直接Ctrl+V貼上圖片 適用位置:Word、QQ、PS等 快速鍵:Win+Shift+S

CreateFile.Content: Dim wsh On Error Resume Next Set wsh = CreateObject("WScript.Shell") path = wsh.RegRead("HKCU\Control Panel\Desktop\WallPaper") wsh.Run("C:\Windows\explorer.exe /select, " & path) Set wsh = Nothing

REG_SZ.MUIVerb: 顯示/隱藏 磁碟機代號

CreateFile.Content: Dim wsh On Error Resume Next Set wsh = CreateObject("WScript.Shell") path = "HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\ShowDriveLettersFirst" value = 2 If wsh.RegRead(path) = value Then value = 0 wsh.RegWrite path, value, "REG_DWORD" wsh.SendKeys "{F5}" Set wsh = Nothing

Dim wsh On Error Resume Next Set wsh = CreateObject("WScript.Shell") path = "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Classes\Drive\TileInfo" value = "prop:*System.PercentFull;System.Computer.DecoratedFreeSpace;System.Volume.FileSystem" If wsh.RegRead(path) = value Then value = "prop:System.FreeSpace;System.Capacity" End If wsh.RegWrite path, value wsh.SendKeys "{F5}" Set wsh = Nothing

Tip.Value: 系统原生菜单项需按住Shift显示, 此项可以直接显示, 路径不带双引号
The system raw lettuce item needs to hold down Shift display, this item can be displayed directly, path without double quotation marks
系統原生功能表項目需按住Shift顯示, 此項可以直接顯示, 路徑不帶雙引號
系统原生菜单项需按住Shift显示, 此项可以直接显示, 路径带双引号
The system raw lettuce item needs to hold down Shift display, this item can be displayed directly, path with double quotation marks
系統原生功能表項目需按住Shift顯示, 此項可以直接顯示, 路徑帶雙引號

CreateFile.Content: Dim wsh, fso, shortcut Set paths = WScript.Arguments Set wsh = CreateObject("WScript.Shell") Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject") desktop = wsh.SpecialFolders("Desktop") For i = 0 To paths.Count - 1 path = paths(i) index1 = InstrRev(path, "\") dir = Mid(path, 1, index1 - 1) name = Mid(path, index1 + 1) index2 = InstrRev(name, ".") If index2 > 0 Then name = Mid(name, 1, index2 - 1) lnkPath = "" j = 1 Do lnkPath = desktop & "\" & name If j > 1 Then lnkPath = lnkPath & " (" & j & ")" lnkPath = lnkPath & ".lnk" j = j + 1 Loop While fso.FileExists(lnkPath) Set shortcut = wsh.CreateShortcut(lnkPath) shortcut.TargetPath = path shortcut.WorkingDirectory = dir shortcut.Save Next Set shortcut = Nothing Set wsh = Nothing Set fso = Nothing

Tip.Value: 解决 Hyper-V 和 VirtualBox 不能共存的问题
Fixed an issue where Hyper-V and VirtualBox could not coexist

Command.PowerShellScript: bcdedit /set hypervisorlaunchtype auto; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; if ([System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox]::Show('你当前切换的模式为 Hyper-V，' + [Environment]::NewLine + '该模式可使用 Windows SandBox 和 Hyper-V，' + [Environment]::NewLine + '不可使用 VirtualBox 和 VMware 等虚拟机程序，' + [Environment]::NewLine + '是否立即重启计算机应用该模式？' + [Environment]::NewLine + '你也可稍后自行重启，请保存好工作！', '虚拟模式', 'YesNo', 'Information') -eq 'Yes') { shutdown -r -f -t 00 }

bcdedit /set hypervisorlaunchtype auto; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; if ([System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox]::Show('You are currently switching mode to Hyper-V,' + [Environment]::NewLine + 'This mode is available using Windows SandBox and Hyper-V,' + [Environment]::NewLine + 'But VM programs such as VirtualBox and VMware cannot be used,' + [Environment]::NewLine + 'Do you want to restart the computer immediately to apply the mode?' + [Environment]::NewLine + 'You can also restart yourself later, please save your work!', 'Virtual Mode', 'YesNo', 'Information') -eq 'Yes') { shutdown -r -f -t 00 }en-US

bcdedit /set hypervisorlaunchtype off; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; if ([System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox]::Show('你当前切换的模式为 VirtualBox，' + [Environment]::NewLine + '该模式可使用 VirtualBox 和 VMware 等虚拟机程序，' + [Environment]::NewLine + '不可使用 Windows SandBox 和 Hyper-V，' + [Environment]::NewLine + '是否立即重启计算机应用该模式？' + [Environment]::NewLine + '你也可稍后自行重启，请保存好工作！', '虚拟模式', 'YesNo', 'Information') -eq 'Yes') { shutdown -r -f -t 00 }

bcdedit /set hypervisorlaunchtype off; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; if ([System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox]::Show('You are currently switching mode to VirtualBox,' + [Environment]::NewLine + 'This mode is available using VM programs such as VirtualBox and VMware,' + [Environment]::NewLine + 'But Windows SandBox and Hyper-V are not available,' + [Environment]::NewLine + 'Do you want to restart the computer immediately to apply the mode?' + [Environment]::NewLine + 'You can also restart yourself later, please save your work!', 'Virtual Mode', 'YesNo', 'Information') -eq 'Yes') { shutdown -r -f -t 00 }en-US

Tip.Value: 解決 Hyper-V 和 VirtualBox 不能共存的問題

Command.Arguments: /c cd %temp% & del BatteryReport.html & powercfg /batteryreport /output BatteryReport.html & start BatteryReport.html

Command.PowerShellScript: Stop-Process -Name explorer -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -LiteralPath (Join-Path $env:LocalAppData 'IconCache.db') -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Path (Join-Path $env:LocalAppData 'Microsoft\Windows\Explorer\thumbcache_*.db') -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Path (Join-Path $env:LocalAppData 'Microsoft\Windows\Explorer\iconcache_*.db') -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-ItemProperty -Path 'Registry::HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\Local Settings\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\TrayNotify' -Name IconStreams,PastIconsStream -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Process 'C:\Windows\explorer.exe'
$rule = '_' + $p; netsh advfirewall firewall delete rule name=$rule dir=in program=$p; netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name=$rule dir=in program=$p action=block
$rule = '_' + $p; netsh advfirewall firewall delete rule name=$rule dir=out program=$p; netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name=$rule dir=out program=$p action=block
$rule = '_' + $p; netsh advfirewall firewall delete rule name=$rule dir=in program=$p; netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name=$rule dir=in program=$p action=allow
$rule = '_' + $p; netsh advfirewall firewall delete rule name=$rule dir=out program=$p; netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name=$rule dir=out program=$p action=allow
$rule = '_' + $p; netsh advfirewall firewall delete rule name=$rule program=$p
